user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the recruitment module, so that the organisation only uses recruitment features when needed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I answer "Do you want to enable the recruitment module?" with Yes or No and click Save; Then the module is enabled or disabled accordingly

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration, so that I can complete recruitment setup in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the recruitment module option; When I click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and the next screen opens
